{{Item
| image = Scent treat.png
| id = scent_treat
| type = Utilities
| stackable = 1
| Description = Right-Click a Block to collect a sample of its scent. 

Right-Click on a Water Caudron to clear its collected scent.

Collected Block Sample:
}}

'''Scent Treat''' is an item that is used to record the scent of the target block for the [[Sniffer Dog]] Talent.

==Obtaining==
===Crafting===
{| class="wikitable"
|-
!Ingredients
!Recipe ''(shapeless)''
|-
|Wool + [[Training Treat]]
|[[File:Scent treat crafting.png]]
|}
==Usage==

=== Use ===
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' the item on your [[Sniffer Dog]], and wait until it gives you back a [[File:Drool scent treat.png|21x21px]]Drool Scent Treat. 
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' a [[File:Drool scent treat.png|21x21px]]Drool Scent Treat to get rid of the drool.

=== Clear ===
*'''<code>Right click</code>''' on a Water Cauldron to clear its collected scent.

== Trivia ==

* It was added in DTN 1.18.5.
